title: Platform-specific shadow keys over boxShadow
message: Your users on the other platform see no shadow when you use elevation.
help: These shadow keys only work on one platform. On RN v7+, use the CSS `boxShadow` string instead, like `boxShadow: "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"`, which works on both.
